title: Metal Pipes
description: This mod adds a metal pipe for every metal in the game. When you strike down enemies it creates the metal pipe falling sound effect.
body:
If you have ever thought to yourself, "Do you know what my Minecraft world needs? Metal pipes,"
this is the mod for YOU. There are 4 new pipes that all have the metal pipes falling sound effect play if you kill something: 
- Iron: 5 damage, 0.9 attack speed, 250 durability
- Gold: 3 damage, 1.1 attack speed, 32 durability
- Copper: 4 damage, 1 attack speed, 186 durability
There is also a version for creative players that does 999 damage and has 100 attack speed
This project was made using MCreator so huge shout out to them.
